title: Dimension of Disaster: Coin of the Realm

startPoint.en: Talk to Aris in her tent south-west of Varrock square.
startPoint.es: Habla con Aris en su tienda al suroeste de la plaza de Varrock.

quests: Dimension of Disaster: Coin of the Realm

rewards.name: New Varrock
rewards.display: Access to New Varrock and the Dimension of Disaster subquests

text.en: # Replay: (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • Accept • 1 Here's the coin. Tell my fortune. • 1 Ugh, we've been through this already.)
text.es: # Replay: (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • Accept • 1 Here's the coin. Tell my fortune. • 1 Ugh, we've been through this already.)

text.en: Talk to Aris. (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • Any)
text.es: Habla con Aris. (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • Any)

text.en: # Replay: (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • 2 Skip it.)
text.es: # Replay: (opciones de chat: 1 Dimension of Disaster. • 2 Skip it.)

text.en: Use Double-headed coin on fountain (at Varrock Square).
text.es: Usa la moneda de dos caras en la fuente (en la plaza de Varrock).

text.en: Talk to the Image of Zemouregal. (opciones de chat: 3 Get to the point.)
text.es: Habla con la Image of Zemouregal. (opciones de chat: 3 Get to the point.)
